V0.M1.AUX.3.description: V0.M1.AUX.3 : V0 must exactly be the same width as M1 along the direction perpendicular to the M1 length.

M1.S.2.description: M1.S.2 : Minimum (tip-to-side) spacing between two M1 layer polygons' edges, when one of the edges is <= 36 nm and the other is > 36 nm, is 25 nm.

M3.S.2.description: M3.S.2 : Minimum (tip-to-side) spacing between two M3 layer polygons' edges, when one of the edges is <= 36 nm and the other is > 36 nm, is 25 nm.

V1.M1.EN.1.description: V1.M1.EN.1 : Minimum enclosure of V1 by M1 on two opposite sides is 5 & 2 nm.

V2.M3.AUX.2.description: V2.M3.AUX.2 : V2 must exactly be the same width as M3 along the direction perpendicular to the M3 length.

M4.S.4.description: M4.S.4 : Minimum tip-to-tip spacing between two M4 layer polygons——that share a parallel run length——on adjacent tracks is 40 nm.

M4.S.5.description: M4.S.5 : Minimum parallel run length of two M4 layer polygons on adjacent tracks is 44 nm.

M4.AUX.2.description: M4.AUX.2 : Minimum width M4 tracks must lie along the horizontal routing tracks at a spacing of 2N x minimum metal width + offset from the origin.

V4.M5.AUX.2.description: V4.M5.AUX.2 : V4 must exactly be the same width as M5 along the direction perpendicular to the M5 length.

V5.M6.AUX.2.description: V5.M6.AUX.2 : V5 must exactly be the same width as M6 along the direction perpendicular to the M6 length.

M4.AUX.1.description: M4.AUX.1 : M4 horizontal edges must be at a grid of 24 nm.

M5.AUX.1.description: M5.AUX.1 : M5 vertical edges must be at a grid of 24 nm.

M6.AUX.1.description: M6.AUX.1 : M6 horizontal edges must be at a grid of 32 nm.
